name: Yuletide Toffee Squares
recipeIngredient: 4 1/2 cups Rolled oats (Quick-cooking or old fashioned)
1/2 cup Corn syrup; light or dark
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 400 degrees. Grease a 15 1/2 x 10 1/2-inch jelly roll pan.
In a large bowl, combine the oats, sugar, butter, corn syrup, vanilla extract and salt. Mix well.
Firmly press the mixture into the prepared pan.
Bake for 15 to 18 minutes, or until the mixture is brown and bubbly. Turn off the heat.
Remove from oven. Let stand for 10 minutes.
Immediately sprinkle the chocolate chips evenly over the toffee.
Spread the chocolate evenly over the toffee. Sprinkle with the nuts.
Cool completely in the pan on a wire rack. To serve, cut into squares.
